test.command: set -e; ROOT="/Users/lubomirmolin/PhpstormProjects/codex-mobile-companion"; if [ ! -f "$ROOT/apps/mobile/pubspec.yaml" ] && [ ! -f "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" ] && [ ! -d "$ROOT/apps/mac-shell" ]; then echo "workspace not scaffolded yet"; exit 0; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/apps/mobile/pubspec.yaml" ]; then (cd "$ROOT/apps/mobile" && flutter test --concurrency=5); fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" ]; then cargo test --manifest-path "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" --workspace --jobs 5; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/apps/mac-shell/CodexMobileCompanion.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj" ]; then xcodebuild test -project "$ROOT/apps/mac-shell/CodexMobileCompanion.xcodeproj" -scheme CodexMobileCompanion -destination 'platform=macOS'; fi

typecheck.command: ROOT="/Users/lubomirmolin/PhpstormProjects/codex-mobile-companion"; if [ ! -f "$ROOT/apps/mobile/pubspec.yaml" ] && [ ! -f "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" ] && [ ! -d "$ROOT/apps/mac-shell" ]; then echo "workspace not scaffolded yet"; exit 0; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/apps/mobile/pubspec.yaml" ]; then flutter analyze "$ROOT/apps/mobile"; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" ]; then cargo check --manifest-path "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" --workspace --all-targets; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/apps/mac-shell/CodexMobileCompanion.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj" ]; then xcodebuild -project "$ROOT/apps/mac-shell/CodexMobileCompanion.xcodeproj" -scheme CodexMobileCompanion -destination 'platform=macOS' build >/dev/null; fi

lint.command: ROOT="/Users/lubomirmolin/PhpstormProjects/codex-mobile-companion"; if [ ! -f "$ROOT/apps/mobile/pubspec.yaml" ] && [ ! -f "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" ] && [ ! -d "$ROOT/apps/mac-shell" ]; then echo "workspace not scaffolded yet"; exit 0; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/apps/mobile/pubspec.yaml" ]; then flutter analyze "$ROOT/apps/mobile"; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" ]; then cargo fmt --manifest-path "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" --all --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/apps/mac-shell/CodexMobileCompanion.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj" ]; then xcodebuild -project "$ROOT/apps/mac-shell/CodexMobileCompanion.xcodeproj" -scheme CodexMobileCompanion -destination 'platform=macOS' build >/dev/null; fi

blockingIssues.description: `CodexRuntimeSupervisor::initialize()` reports auto mode as attached whenever an endpoint is configured, so `/health` can claim runtime attachment without verifying Codex reachability or falling back to spawning a local runtime. This does not satisfy the promised start-or-attach lifecycle behavior.

The bridge is wired to `ThreadApiService::sample()` and serves hard-coded thread/timeline fixtures, so `GET /threads`, `GET /threads/:id`, and `GET /threads/:id/timeline` do not expose real normalized Codex data yet.

appliedUpdates.description: Recorded the concrete websocket subscription ack contract and normalized mutation/git response shapes in `.factory/library/api.md`.

rejectedObservations.observation: Strengthen the shared bridge healthcheck so it detects false-positive runtime attachment states.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected for now because `.factory/services.yaml` service edits must be additive, and changing the existing `bridge.healthcheck` would overwrite current shared state while the underlying lifecycle bug remains unresolved in `bridge-codex-adapter-thread-api`.
